name: Tangy Lemon Custard Tart
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Whole Wheat Pastry Flour, Or
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and date sugar. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and grate in butter (or stir in oil). Using fingers or a pastry mixer, combine the butter and flour mixture until it is the texture of cornmeal. Do not overmix. Add egg white, vinegar, and enough ice water to form a ball of dough. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
3. In a blender or food processor, combine lemon rind, juice, honey, and eggs. Puree until smooth.
4. Lightly flour a counter or breadboard. Roll the ball of dough into a 14-inch circle and press into a 9-inch tart pan (preferably one with fluted edges). Pour in lemon filling.
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F, then lower heat to 350°F and bake until firm and lightly browned (about 30 more minutes).
Makes 1 nine-inch tart.
